all_namespaces.description: Allow access to all namespaces instead of the configured namespace list.

in_cluster.description: Use in-cluster Kubernetes service account configuration.

kubeconfig_env.description: Environment variable containing kubeconfig content or a kubeconfig path.

namespaces.description: Kubernetes namespaces this plugin may inspect.

oneOf.description: Loki log query integration.

auto_discover.description: Options for discovering Loki endpoints from Kubernetes.

allow_pod_ip.description: Allow direct pod IP endpoints during discovery.

kubernetes.description: Discover Loki endpoints from Kubernetes services and pods.

namespaces.description: Kubernetes namespaces searched during Loki discovery.

port_forward.description: Use Kubernetes port-forwarding for discovered Loki endpoints.

prefer_service.description: Prefer Kubernetes service endpoints over pod IPs when both are available.

probe_timeout.description: Timeout for probing discovered Loki endpoints using Go duration syntax such as 5s.

default_namespace.description: Default Kubernetes namespace filter for Loki queries.

default_since.description: Default lookback duration for recent log queries

endpoint_ref.description: Runtime endpoint reference for a discovered Loki service.

labels.description: Loki labels exposed for filtering and datasource records.

max_limit.description: Hard maximum log entries accepted from manifest or operation input.

tenant_id.description: Loki tenant id for multi-tenant deployments.

tenant_id_env.description: Environment variable containing the Loki tenant id.

url_env.description: Environment variable containing the Loki base URL.

instance.description: Optional plugin instance name. Defaults to the plugin kind.

specs.description: OpenAPI documents to load and expose as generated operations or datasource docs.

auth.description: Security scheme credential mappings for generated operations.

schemes.description: Credential mappings keyed by OpenAPI security scheme name.

index.description: Indexing options for the generated OpenAPI documentation datasource.

enabled.description: Whether generated OpenAPI documentation should be indexed.

freshness.description: How often generated OpenAPI documentation may be refreshed. Use Go duration syntax such as 24h.

name.description: Name for the generated OpenAPI documentation datasource.

file.description: Local file path to the OpenAPI document.

operations.description: Generated operation selection and naming options.

exclude.description: Operation IDs or patterns to exclude.

include.description: Operation IDs or patterns to include.

overrides.description: Per-operation naming and description overrides keyed by OpenAPI operation id.

prefix.description: Prefix added to generated operation names.

url.description: HTTP URL of the OpenAPI document.

instance.description: Optional plugin instance name. Defaults to the plugin kind.

oneOf.description: Slack channel and datasource integration.

auth.description: Slack authentication source and token selection.

app_token_env.description: Environment variable containing the Slack xapp app token when method is env. Defaults to SLACK_APP_TOKEN.

bot_token_env.description: Environment variable containing the Slack xoxb bot token when method is env. Defaults to SLACK_BOT_TOKEN.

channel_token.description: Token preference for Slack channel posting. auto prefers a bot token and falls back to a user token.

method.description: Slack auth method. token uses Fluxplane stored secrets; env reads process environment variables; oauth2 uses stored OAuth2 token material.

user_token_env.description: Environment variable containing the Slack xoxp user token when method is env. Defaults to SLACK_USER_TOKEN.

instance.description: Optional plugin instance name. Defaults to the plugin kind.
